name: communitme-workspace
description: CommunitMe workspace root — install and run every project from one place. Each project remains its own git submodule with its own package.json.

scripts.install:all: npm run install:members && npm run install:admin && npm run install:community && npm run install:onboarding && npm run install:notifications
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n members,admin,community,onboarding,notifications -c blue.bold,green.bold,yellow.bold,magenta.bold,cyan.bold "npm run dev:members" "npm run dev:admin" "npm run dev:community" "npm run dev:onboarding" "npm run dev:notifications"
scripts.build: npm run build:members && npm run build:admin && npm run build:community && npm run build:onboarding && npm run build:notifications
scripts.pull:schemas: npm run pull:schemas:members && npm run pull:schemas:notifications
scripts.pull:schemas:notifications: npm --prefix notifications/utils run prisma:dbpull && npm --prefix notifications/utils run prisma:generate
